jira_context:
[2026-02-01 08:00 - charlie@redhat.com]
Requesting onboarding of complex-pkg 4.1.0. This package provides GPU-accelerated tensor operations. Need builds for both CPU and CUDA 12.x variants.

[2026-02-03 11:30 - dana@redhat.com]
Blocking this: complex-pkg 4.1.0 has a known memory leak in the CUDA path (upstream issue #892). We should wait for the fix.

[2026-02-05 09:15 - charlie@redhat.com]
Pinning version to 4.1.0 as discussed in the planning meeting. We need this for the Q1 release.

[2026-02-10 16:45 - dana@redhat.com]
Upstream fixed the memory leak in 4.2.0 (merged PR #901). Unblocking. We should use 4.2.x instead of 4.1.0 to get the fix.

[2026-02-11 08:30 - charlie@redhat.com]
Agreed, updating target to complex-pkg 4.2.x. The CUDA 12.x requirement still stands. CPU variant also needed.

[2026-02-12 14:00 - eve@redhat.com]
License review complete: Apache-2.0, cleared for redistribution. No additional IP concerns.
